economic_notes: Holds 5% interest in Keeyask Hydro Power Limited Partnership (KHLP) valued at $76.1M. Fox and York Keeyask Joint Venture (50% equity). Multiple joint ventures with Sodexo Canada and others for Manitoba Hydro camp services. Operates gaming centre, smoke shop, hospitality, construction, rentals, and insurance subsidiary.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2023 — not 2024. Auditor report signed July 22, 2024. Large Manitoba Hydro loan of $77.9M dominates long-term debt; includes $15.9M accrued interest. Keeyask Hydro Power LP investment carried at $76.1M. Net tangible capital assets not extractable from provided text (full balance sheet not included). Net financial assets not calculable from provided text. expenses_housing combines Band Housing ($1,224,617) and CMHC Housing ($324,506). expenses_enterprises combines First Nation Programs ($5,464,119), Gaming Centre and Smoke Shop ($1,595,856). total_government_transfers = ISC ($6,943,325) + FNIHB ($2,315,732) + CMHC ($139,418) + Province of Manitoba ($223,394) + Tribal Council ($239,572) + Manitoba Hydro ($3,704,620) less deferred revenue adjustments not separately allocable — computed as sum of government transfer lines only. No schedule of remuneration provided in extracted text.
